meals.name: Herb-Crusted Boiled Egg with Sourdough & Berries
meals.image_prompt: soft-boiled egg halves on wholegrain sourdough toast, fresh herbs sprinkled on top, bowl of raspberries and blueberries on the side, bright morning light, wooden plate
prep_steps: Boil eggs (soft, 6 min), cool, peel, store in container
day_of_steps: Toast 1 slice sourdough (Diego) or 0.75 slice (Diana)
Place egg halves on toast, sprinkle dried herbs & sea salt
Serve with 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) mixed fresh berries

meals.name: Apple with Roasted Almonds
meals.image_prompt: crisp green apple sliced into wedges, scattered roasted almonds on a white plate, morning natural light, simple and fresh
day_of_steps: Slice 1 medium apple (Diego) or 0.8 medium apple (Diana) into wedges
Serve with 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) roasted unsalted almonds

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: grilled chicken breast with Mediterranean herb crust, served with roasted zucchini, bell peppers, and cherry tomatoes, fluffy quinoa on the side, drizzle of olive oil, warm afternoon light, terracotta plate
prep_steps: Grill chicken breasts (180g Diego / 140g Diana raw) with garlic & oregano until cooked through, cool & store
Roast mixed veg (zucchini, red bell pepper, cherry tomatoes): toss with 2 tsp olive oil (Diego) / 1.5 tsp (Diana), roast 200°C 25 min, cool & store
Cook quinoa 1:2 ratio until fluffy, cool & store
day_of_steps: Reheat chicken (5 min, 160°C oven or microwave)
Reheat roasted veg (2 min, microwave)
Portion into bowl: 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) quinoa, top with chicken & vegetables
Add squeeze of lemon juice

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: creamy Greek yogurt in a clear glass bowl, topped with fresh blueberries and chopped walnuts, hint of honey drizzle, soft natural light
prep_steps: Portion Greek yogurt into containers: 200g (Diego) / 150g (Diana)
day_of_steps: Spoon yogurt into a bowl
Top with 30g (Diego) or 25g (Diana) chopped walnuts
Add 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) fresh blueberries

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Lemon Butter, Green Beans & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: flaked white fish fillet with golden lemon butter sauce, fresh steamed green beans on the side, diced roasted sweet potato, garnished with fresh dill, white ceramic plate, soft evening light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Place white fish (180g Diego / 140g Diana raw) on baking parchment, season with lemon juice, herbs, 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) butter, wrap loosely
Bake 15 min until opaque
Meanwhile, steam green beans 200g (Diego) / 150g (Diana) for 5 min
Dice and warm sweet potato 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana) cooked from fridge or oven (if fresh, roast 20 min at 200°C)
Plate fish, top with pan juices, serve with beans & sweet potato

meals.name: Smoked Salmon & Cream Cheese on Rye
meals.image_prompt: sliced rye bread topped with cream cheese and silky smoked salmon, thin lemon slice, fresh dill garnish, whole orange segments on the side, bright morning light, white plate
day_of_steps: Slice 1.5 (Diego) or 1.2 (Diana) slices wholegrain rye bread
Spread 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) cream cheese on each slice
Layer 50g (Diego) or 40g (Diana) smoked salmon
Garnish with fresh dill & lemon zest
Serve with 1 whole orange (Diego) or 0.8 whole orange (Diana)

meals.name: Pear with Cashews
meals.image_prompt: ripe yellow pear cut into quarters, scattered roasted cashews on a slate plate, natural morning light, fresh and simple
day_of_steps: Slice 1 large pear (Diego) or 0.8 large pear (Diana) into quarters
Serve with 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) roasted unsalted cashews

meals.name: Spiced Turkey Meatballs with Brown Lentil Salad & Roasted Beets
meals.image_prompt: browned turkey meatballs stacked on a bed of warm brown lentils, roasted beet cubes scattered around, dressed with balsamic vinegar and fresh parsley, earthy terracotta bowl, soft natural light
prep_steps: Make turkey meatballs (200g minced turkey Diego / 160g Diana, mixed with 1 egg, 20g breadcrumbs, garlic, cumin, paprika per batch)
Bake at 190°C 20 min, cool & store
Cook brown lentils until tender but not mushy, cool & store
Roast beets (sliced thin): toss with 1 tsp oil, roast 200°C 30 min, cool & store
day_of_steps: Reheat meatballs 3 min (160°C or microwave)
Warm lentils 2 min
Portion into bowl: 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) warm lentils
Top with meatballs & beets
Drizzle 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) balsamic vinegar & fresh parsley

meals.name: Nectarine with Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: ripe nectarine cut in half, pit removed, scattered roasted salted pistachios on a white plate, summer afternoon light, juicy and fresh
day_of_steps: Halve 1 large nectarine (Diego) or 0.9 large nectarine (Diana), remove pit
Serve with 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) roasted salted pistachios

meals.name: Pan-Seared Tuna Steak with Sesame Bok Choy & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: seared tuna steak with a caramelized crust, medium-rare center, glazed sesame bok choy alongside, fluffy brown rice base, drizzle of sesame oil, ceramic plate, warm evening light
day_of_steps: Cook brown rice fresh (160g Diego / 120g Diana cooked): bring 1:2.5 ratio to boil, simmer 30 min until tender
Trim bok choy, halve lengthwise (300g Diego / 240g Diana)
Heat 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) sesame oil in a pan over high heat
Sear bok choy 3 min per side until caramelized, set aside
Season tuna steak (180g Diego / 140g Diana) with sea salt & pepper
Sear in hot pan 2 min per side for medium-rare
Plate: rice + bok choy + tuna, drizzle pan juices + soy sauce (0.5 tsp)

meals.name: Soft Cheese & Wheatgerm Toast with Kiwi
meals.image_prompt: warm toasted wholegrain bread spread with soft goat cheese, topped with wheat germ and a drizzle of honey, fresh kiwi slices on the side, bright morning light, rustic wooden board
day_of_steps: Toast 1.5 (Diego) or 1.2 (Diana) slices wholegrain bread
Spread 30g (Diego) or 25g (Diana) soft goat cheese on warm toast
Sprinkle 15g (Diego) or 12g (Diana) wheat germ
Serve with 2 kiwis (Diego) or 1.5 kiwis (Diana), peeled and sliced

meals.name: Mixed Berries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: fresh raspberries, blackberries, and strawberries in a clear bowl, scattered almonds on top, white ceramic spoon, natural mid-morning light, bright and appetising
day_of_steps: Combine 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) mixed fresh berries (raspberries, blackberries, strawberries) in a bowl
Top with 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) whole almonds

meals.name: Chicken Caesar Salad with Wholegrain Croutons
meals.image_prompt: crisp romaine lettuce tossed with shaved Parmesan, golden wholegrain croutons, sliced grilled chicken breast, creamy Caesar dressing drizzle, lemon wedges, white bowl, bright afternoon light
prep_steps: Use pre-cooked chicken from Monday batch (prep_batch_2): slice 150g (Diego) / 115g (Diana)
Make wholegrain croutons: cube 50g (Diego) / 40g (Diana) wholegrain bread, toss 1 tsp oil, roast 200°C 10 min, cool & store
Make Caesar dressing: blend 50g Greek yogurt, 1 tbsp Dijon mustard, 1 tsp lemon juice, 1 tsp balsamic, 0.5 tsp Worcestershire, garlic powder, store in container
day_of_steps: Slice 200g (Diego) or 150g (Diana) romaine lettuce, wash & dry
Toss lettuce with 3 tbsp (Diego) or 2.5 tbsp (Diana) Caesar dressing
Top with sliced chicken, croutons, & 20g (Diego) / 15g (Diana) shaved Parmesan
Serve with lemon wedge for squeezing

meals.name: Hummus & Carrot Sticks
meals.image_prompt: creamy chickpea hummus in a shallow white bowl with a drizzle of olive oil, scattered paprika, surrounded by fresh carrot and celery sticks, natural afternoon light, Mediterranean style
prep_steps: Make hummus: blend 240g cooked chickpeas, 2 tbsp tahini, 2 tbsp lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic, 2 tbsp water, 1 tsp salt, 0.5 tsp cumin until smooth
Portion into containers: 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) per snack
day_of_steps: Spoon 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) hummus into a small bowl
Arrange 150g (Diego) or 120g (Diana) fresh carrot sticks (or mixed carrot & celery) around it
Top hummus with pinch of paprika & 0.5 tsp olive oil

meals.name: Mexican Lean Beef & Chickpea Taco Bowls with Cilantro-Lime Dressing
meals.image_prompt: deconstructed taco bowl: seasoned ground beef and chickpeas on a bed of cilantro-lime cauliflower rice, topped with shredded red cabbage, diced avocado, fresh cilantro, lime crema drizzle, white ceramic bowl, warm light
prep_steps: Brown 250g lean ground beef (5% fat) with cumin, paprika, garlic, chilli powder, no oil needed (renders fat), cool & store
Cook 150g dried chickpeas or use 300g canned (drained): simmer until tender, cool & store
Make cauliflower rice: pulse 500g cauliflower florets into rice-sized pieces, sauté 2 min in 1 tsp oil, cool & store
Make cilantro-lime dressing: blend 100g Greek yogurt, juice of 1 lime, 20g fresh cilantro, 1 clove garlic, store in container
day_of_steps: Reheat beef & chickpeas 3 min
Warm cauliflower rice 2 min
Portion into bowl: 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) cauliflower rice base
Top with 120g (Diego) / 95g (Diana) beef-chickpea mix
Add 50g (Diego) / 40g (Diana) diced red cabbage (raw), 40g (Diego) / 30g (Diana) diced avocado
Drizzle 2 tbsp (Diego) / 1.5 tbsp (Diana) cilantro-lime dressing
Garnish with fresh cilantro

meals.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Granola & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: layered glass bowl of creamy Greek yogurt, topped with honey granola clusters and fresh strawberry slices, drizzle of honey, bright morning light, minimalist plating
prep_steps: Layer Greek yogurt, homemade granola, and pre-sliced strawberries into portioned containers (keep separate until serving)
day_of_steps: Layer into a bowl: 180g (Diego) or 140g (Diana) Greek yogurt
Top with 40g (Diego) or 30g (Diana) granola
Add 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) fresh strawberry slices
Drizzle 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) raw honey on top

meals.name: Apple Slices with Almond Butter
meals.image_prompt: red apple sliced into wedges, small white bowl of creamy natural almond butter with apple slice dipped in, wooden background, natural light
day_of_steps: Slice 1 medium apple (Diego) or 0.85 medium apple (Diana)
Serve with 20g (Diego) or 16g (Diana) natural unsweetened almond butter on the side for dipping

meals.name: Italian Herb Chicken Bowl with Farro & Roasted Vegetables
meals.image_prompt: herb-crusted chicken pieces over chewy farro grain, surrounded by roasted eggplant, zucchini, and red onion, drizzle of balsamic, fresh basil garnish, wooden bowl, warm natural light
prep_steps: Marinate chicken breast (200g Diego / 160g Diana raw) in 1 tbsp olive oil, 2 tsp lemon juice, oregano, thyme, garlic for 2 hrs
Bake at 195°C 22 min until cooked through, cool & store
Cook farro (dried measure): 70g (Diego) / 55g (Diana) in 1:3 water until chewy, cool & store
Roast mixed veg (eggplant, zucchini): toss 250g (Diego) / 200g (Diana) with 1 tsp oil (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana), roast 200°C 25 min, cool & store
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of poultry only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 4. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Reheat chicken 3 min (160°C oven)
Warm farro & vegetables 2 min in microwave
Assemble bowl: 70g (Diego) or 55g (Diana) farro base
Top with 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana) sliced chicken
Add roasted vegetables 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana)
Drizzle 0.5 tsp balsamic vinegar, garnish with fresh basil
meals.safety_note: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of poultry only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 4. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)

meals.name: Banana with Walnuts

day_of_steps: Peel & slice 0.75 medium banana (Diego) or 0.6 medium banana (Diana)
Serve with 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) walnut pieces

meals.name: Baked Salmon with Dill, Roasted Asparagus & New Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: pink salmon fillet with fresh dill sprigs, crispy roasted asparagus spears, golden roasted new potatoes with herb butter, squeeze of lemon, white ceramic plate, sunset light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Wash new potatoes (180g Diego / 150g Diana), cut in half, toss with 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) olive oil, sea salt, roast 18 min
Trim asparagus (220g Diego / 180g Diana), toss with 0.5 tsp oil, add to potatoes for last 10 min of roasting
Place salmon fillet (180g Diego / 150g Diana raw) on baking parchment, season with lemon juice, fresh dill, 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) butter
Bake 12 min until opaque
Plate: potatoes & asparagus, top with salmon, drizzle pan juices, lemon wedge

meals.name: Poached Eggs on Multigrain Toast with Tomato & Herbs
meals.image_prompt: two poached eggs with runny yolk on multigrain toast, sliced fresh tomato underneath, fresh basil and black pepper, white ceramic plate, bright morning light
day_of_steps: Toast 1.5 (Diego) or 1.2 (Diana) slices multigrain bread until golden
Meanwhile, poach 2 eggs (Diego) or 2 eggs (Diana) in simmering water + vinegar, 4 min until set white, runny yolk
Slice 1 medium tomato (Diego) or 0.8 medium tomato (Diana)

Garnish with fresh basil, sea salt & black pepper

meals.name: Peach with Cashews

meals.name: Spiced Lentil & Turkey Meatbowl with Spinach & Pomegranate

prep_steps: Use cooked turkey meatballs from Tuesday batch (prep_batch_4): portion 160g (Diego) / 125g (Diana)
Cook red lentils fresh or use from batch: 100g (Diego) / 80g (Diana) cooked, season with cumin, turmeric, cinnamon
Make tahini dressing: blend 60g Greek yogurt, 1.5 tbsp tahini, 2 tbsp lemon juice, 1 clove garlic, water to thin, store

Reheat meatballs 2 min (if using batch)

meals.name: Asian Ginger-Soy Chicken Stir-Fry with Broccoli & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: vibrant stir-fried chicken pieces with tender broccoli florets and snap peas, glossy ginger-soy sauce coating, served over fluffy brown rice, garnished with sesame seeds and scallions, wok-tossed appearance, warm kitchen light
day_of_steps: Cook brown rice fresh: 160g (Diego) / 120g (Diana) cooked measure: bring 1:2.5 ratio to boil, simmer 30 min
Prep vegetables: cut 300g (Diego) / 240g (Diana) broccoli florets, 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) snap peas
Make sauce: blend 2 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp ginger (grated), 1 clove garlic, 1 tsp honey, 1 tsp cornstarch, 60ml water

Heat 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) sesame oil in wok/pan over high heat, stir-fry chicken 6 min until cooked
Add vegetables, stir-fry 4 min, pour sauce, toss 2 min until glossy

Top with sliced chicken & warm roasted chickpeas

meals.name: Herb-Crusted Cod with Roasted Root Vegetables & Wilted Kale
meals.image_prompt: flaky white cod fillet with herb crust, surrounded by roasted carrots, parsnips, and purple potatoes, bed of wilted kale with lemon, white plate, warm evening light, rustic presentation

Toss veg with 1.5 tsp (Diego) / 1 tsp (Diana) olive oil, sea salt, thyme, roast 20 min

Bake cod on parchment 13 min until opaque

Portion berries 100g (Diego) / 80g (Diana) into containers

meals.name: Spanish Chickpea & Vegetable Stew with Grilled Chicken
meals.image_prompt: hearty Spanish stew with white beans and chickpeas, tomato base, diced bell peppers, onions softened, tender grilled chicken pieces on top, garnished with fresh parsley, rustic earthen bowl, warm afternoon light
prep_steps: Make stew: sauté garlic & diced carrots 2 min, add 400g canned tomato passata, 150g cooked chickpeas, 150g cooked white beans, 200g diced mixed peppers, 1 tsp paprika, 0.5 tsp cumin, 200ml vegetable stock, simmer 20 min until veg tender, cool & portion
Use pre-cooked grilled chicken from batch: portion 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana)
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of legumes only keeps ~5 day(s), and this is day 7. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Reheat stew 3 min (160°C or microwave)
Top stew with 150g (Diego) or 120g (Diana) sliced grilled chicken
Garnish with fresh parsley & squeeze of lemon
Serve with 100ml (Diego) or 80ml (Diana) stew per bowl

meals.name: Kiwi with Cashews
meals.image_prompt: two kiwis cut in half, bright green flesh visible, scattered roasted cashews on a white plate, afternoon light, tropical and fresh
day_of_steps: Peel & halve 2 kiwis (Diego) or 1.7 kiwis (Diana)

meals.name: Pan-Seared Turkey Cutlet with Roasted Mushrooms & Polenta
meals.image_prompt: golden pan-seared turkey cutlet, tender roasted mixed mushrooms (porcini, cremini), creamy soft polenta base, drizzle of white wine reduction, fresh thyme sprig, elegant white plate, warm evening light
day_of_steps: Start polenta: bring 400ml vegetable stock to boil, whisk in 70g (Diego) / 55g (Diana) polenta cornmeal slowly, stir constantly 15 min until creamy, season with sea salt & pepper
Meanwhile, halve 300g (Diego) / 240g (Diana) mixed mushrooms (cremini, porcini), toss with 1 tsp (Diego) / 0.75 tsp (Diana) olive oil, thyme, roast 200°C 15 min until tender
Pound turkey cutlet (190g Diego / 150g Diana) thin, season salt & pepper
Heat 0.5 tsp oil in pan, sear turkey 4 min per side until golden, set aside
Deglaze pan with 60ml white wine, simmer 2 min, pour over turkey
Plate: soft polenta base, roasted mushrooms, top with turkey & sauce
